prompt: A photorealistic receipt from a floating market in Thailand, water-stained and written in Thai script, showing tropical fruits and street food, with a lotus flower pressed against it
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image of a water-stained receipt from a Thai floating market. The receipt is prominently displayed, covered in authentic Thai script, and depicts various tropical fruits and local street food. A fresh lotus flower is gently pressed flat against the receipt's surface, partially overlapping some of the text and imagery.
objects: authentic Thai script on the receipt
tropical fruits depicted on the receipt
local street food depicted on the receipt
lotus flower pressed flat against the receipt's surface
lotus flower partially overlapping text and imagery on the receipt
